name: Pesto-Cheese Pastries
recipeInstructions:
1. Unfreeze the filo sheets and brush one with butter, keeping the remaining covered.
2. Place a sheet of filo dough on top of the butter and brush the other side with more butter.
3. Spread 2 tablespoons of pesto along one end of the filo sheet in a rectangular pattern.
4. Sprinkle 1 tablespoon of grated parmesan and 1 slice of swiss cheese over the pesto.
5. Fold in the long sides, beginning at the filling, to roll up like a jelly roll.
6. Place the rolled pastry seam-side down on a parchment-lined baking sheet. Brush with butter.
7. Repeat steps 1-6 with the remaining filo sheets, butter, pesto, and cheeses.
8. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 20-30 minutes, until golden brown.
9. Cut diagonally into 1-inch pieces.
10. Garnish with fresh basil leaves and serve hot.
